content: Hono router pattern: createGithubRouter(db, registry) returns Hono instance, mounted at /api/github via app.route(). Use c.req.query() (no args) to get all params as Record<string,string> — avoids Hono v4 type overload issues with single-arg query().

Bun WebSocket handler: use server.upgrade(req) in Bun.serve fetch handler. Store connId on ws object via type cast. WsHandler manages connection lifecycle; ChannelRegistry is pure pub/sub decoupled from transport.

name: hono-vitest-testing
description: TDD with Hono in Vitest: app.fetch(new Request(url, init)) tests routes in-process without a running server. Use mkdtemp/rm for isolated per-suite SQLite DBs.
